actions.addendum_en: The golden retriever puppy remains the main subject, unchanged in pose and position, while a small pale crab scuttles out of the wet sand to the right, sidesteps around a seashell, and slips into a shallow burrow near the waterline as the sand settles behind it.
actions.prompt_en: A third-person gameplay video where a fluffy golden retriever puppy with soft golden fur and floppy ears is the playable character. The camera follows from behind and slightly above, like a modern 3D game. The puppy runs and bounds across a sunny beach of pale sand, past scattered seashells, a striped beach ball, and a small sandcastle near a wooden lifeguard tower, in response to keyboard arrow keys (or WASD), changing direction naturally with game-like movement and physics. It always stays on all four paws while running. The scene looks like real gameplay with realistic lighting, smooth camera tracking, high-quality graphics, and an Unreal Engine 5 style. actions.addendum_en: The puppy pounces onto the nearby sandcastle, slamming both front paws into its wet-sand turrets. The towers crack and crumble on impact, spraying loose sand across the beach before the scattered grains settle around the puppy's paws.

actions.addendum_en: The puppy scoops the striped beach ball with its snout and flicks it hard, sending the ball arcing high across the sand toward the distant wooden lifeguard tower. It strikes a support post with a hollow thump, knocking a small spray of dry sand off the railing before the ball rolls to a stop.
